prompt: Generate a modern sleeping tracking app interface screenshot on a smartphone mock-up. Displaying a task list, use a clean UI/UX design with gradient elements and the light background and purple, green, blue color palette inspired by the WalletSpace reference image.
searchQueryGenerated: Modern clean software UI screenshot example
prompt_refined: Generate a modern, minimalist sleeping tracking app interface screenshot displayed on a smartphone mock-up. The interface should feature a clean UI/UX design with ample whitespace and well-defined sections. Include a prominent, vertically aligned task list with checkable items, relevant to sleep habits (e.g., 'Go to bed by 10 PM', 'Avoid caffeine after 3 PM'). The overall screen background should be light. Incorporate gradient elements throughout the interface, specifically utilizing a color palette of purples, greens, and blues for UI components, accent colors, and subtle background effects, consistent with the aesthetic and gradient style seen in image 1.
objects: Checkable items for sleep habits (e.g., 'Go to bed by 10 PM', 'Avoid caffeine after 3 PM')
UI components with purples, greens, and blues gradient palette
Subtle background effects with purples, greens, and blues gradient palette
Smartphone status bar (time, signal, battery icons)
